task: Read @ArcAid/ArcAid_Project_Handover.md to get up to speed. Take a look at the project contents in @TableFlipper/ repo to familiarize yourself with the original TableFlipper application that we are basing this new ArcAid app on. The @TableFlipper/TODO_v2.md will show you what we are going to work on next. Create a new TODO.md in the @ArcAid repo based off the one in TableFlipper, to track all of our tasks. All work should be done on a feature branch using proper git best practices. The repo is initialized already. All new work you will do will only be done in the @ArcAid repo.
final_instruction: Remember to think step-by-step before answering.
